name: Daily Haiku
customPrompt: Write a haiku about the current season and time of day.

name: Weekly City Report
customPrompt: Provide a summary of interesting facts about a random European capital city.

name: Hourly Cat Check
customPrompt: Meow and tell me how you're feeling right now.

name: PR Review Reminder
customPrompt: A pull request was opened. Write a haiku inspired by the PR title.

name: Issue Tracker
customPrompt: A Linear issue was updated. Summarize the change.

name: Custom Event Handler
customPrompt: React to this webhook event like a curious cat would.
